SpongeBob (with -Extreme confidence
-Saiyan will power
-Desire strength, speed, power level, and over all super natural condition like a Saiyan
-Genetics are amplified
-Obtain God Ki
-Desired physique
-A strong lust for battle
-Undying motivation
-A faster metabolism
-Gain muscle mass faster
-Ancient SSG Race DNA
-Become an Ancient God Saiyan
-True God-Ki
-Regular Ki as well
-God Abilities
-God Forms
-Super Saiyan God for is built in you (no rituals)
-Supernatural amounts of energy
-Supernatural reproduction
-Supernatural strength
-Much more in terms of the Ancient Saiyans & Saiyan Gods, Omni Saiyan + All Forms/Evolutions/Fusions + Saiyan Physiology) vs. Pan (Greek Mythology)

With all of these enhancements and powers, SpongeBob would easily overpower Pan and any of her mythological abilities. He would be able to match her with godly powers and outmatch her with his Supernatural strength, extreme confidence, and undying motivation to win. His Saiyan will power would give him an immense ability to fight and overcome difficult situations, and his Ancient God Saiyan DNA would make him nearly unstoppable. With access to God Abilities and God Forms, along with the built-in Super Saiyan God form, SpongeBob would be a force to be reckoned with. 

In terms of his supernatural reproduction, this would give him the ability to reproduce quickly and create a nearly endless army of powerful beings like himself. His faster metabolism, muscle mass gain, and desire for strength and power would make him a formidable opponent in any battle. 

In the end, SpongeBob would emerge victorious against Pan and any other mythological creatures who dared to challenge him. His combination of Saiyan and Ancient God powers would make him a unique and powerful warrior, capable of taking on any foe.

-Much more in terms of the Ancient Saiyans & Saiyan Gods, Omni Saiyan + All Forms/Evolutions/Fusions + Saiyan Physiology) vs. Typhon (Greek Mythology)

SpongeBob, with all of his Saiyan and Ancient God powers, would be more than equipped to take on the monstrous Typhon from Greek Mythology. With his extreme confidence, strong desire for strength, and undying motivation, SpongeBob would be fearless in his fight against Typhon.

Not only would SpongeBob have access to God and Super Saiyan God forms, but he would also possess True God-Ki and regular Ki, making him a versatile fighter able to adapt to any situation. His Supernatural strength and increased muscle mass gain, along with his faster metabolism, would give him an advantage in close combat, allowing him to overpower Typhon in hand-to-hand combat.

SpongeBob's Supernatural energy levels and reproduction abilities would give him the ability to continuously fight and sustain himself in battle, while his combination of Saiyan and Ancient God powers would make him nearly invincible. With access to God Abilities and Forms, he could also control the very elements of nature, making it difficult for Typhon to gain the upper hand.

Overall, SpongeBob's combination of Saiyan and Ancient God powers, coupled with his supernatural abilities, would make him an unstoppable force against Typhon and any other Greek Mythological creature that challenges him.

-Much more in terms of the Ancient Saiyans & Saiyan Gods, Omni Saiyan + All Forms/Evolutions/Fusions + Saiyan Physiology) vs. The Gorgons (Greek Mythology)

The Gorgons, with their powers of turning people to stone, would seem like formidable opponents for SpongeBob. However, with all of his enhancements and powers, SpongeBob would be more than a match for these mythical creatures.

SpongeBob's extreme confidence and Saiyan will power would make him immune to the Gorgons' stone gaze and he would be prepared for anything they could throw at him. His Supernatural strength and heightened speed and power levels would make him agile and quick on his feet, giving him an edge in close combat.

With his Ancient God Saiyan DNA, SpongeBob would become nearly invincible to the Gorgons' powers, and his True God-Ki and regular Ki would give him access to supernatural abilities and forms. His Super Saiyan God form, built into him without the need for any ritual, would be a key to unlocking his full power, allowing him to match the Gorgons' strength and possibly even disintegrate them with his power.

Additionally, SpongeBob's Supernatural reproduction and energy levels would give him the ability to fight without rest and keep up with the Gorgons in terms of endurance. With his godly abilities, he could also control the very elements of nature, making it hard for the Gorgons to gain an upper hand.

Overall, SpongeBob's combination of Saiyan and Ancient God powers, along with his Supernatural abilities, would make him an almost unbeatable opponent against the Gorgons. In the end, he would emerge victorious, leaving the Gorgons turning to stone in his wake.

-Much more in terms of the Ancient Saiyans & Saiyan Gods, Omni Saiyan + All Forms/Evolutions/Fusions + Saiyan Physiology) vs. Chimera (Greek Mythology)

The Chimera, with its various animal parts and fire-breathing ability, is a formidable opponent, but with all of his powers and enhancements, SpongeBob would still be a match for it.

SpongeBob's Saiyan willpower and extreme confidence would allow him to face this creature head-on without fear, while his Ancient God Saiyan DNA and Supernatural strength would allow him to go toe-to-toe with any of the Chimera's best moves. Additionally, his True God-Ki and regular Ki would give him an added range of abilities and access to powerful forms such as Super Saiyan God.

With his desired physique and faster metabolism, SpongeBob can not only keep up with the Chimera's movements but also overtake it with his speed and agility. His Supernatural amounts of energy would allow him to battle the Chimera without running out of stamina.

His combination of Saiyan and Ancient God powers, along with his Supernatural abilities, would make him almost unbeatable against the Chimera, even with its fire-breathing ability. With his godly abilities, he could even gain control over the very element of fire, enabling him to neutralize the Chimera's fire attacks.

Overall, SpongeBob's Omni Saiyan + All Forms/Evolutions/Fusions + Saiyan Physiology powers would make him nearly an unbeatable force against the Chimera. In the end, his powers and prowess would prevail against the ancient creature, and he would emerge victorious.
And Plus SpongeBob can change into powerful forms that Chimera can not handle

That's right! SpongeBob can transform into many different powerful forms, such as Super Saiyan, Super Saiyan God, and even fusion forms like Vegito. These transformations would enable him to tap into even more of his immense power and easily overpower the Chimera.

For example, Super Saiyan God form would allow SpongeBob to access even more godly powers and abilities, such as heightened senses, increased strength, and the ability to control elemental forces like thunder and lightning. This, coupled with his Supernatural strength and speed, would make SpongeBob an almost unbeatable opponent for the Chimera.

The Fusion form, Vegito, would allow SpongeBob to fuse with another warrior, becoming exponentially stronger. This would give him even more power than he already possesses, enabling him to defeat the Chimera with ease.

In the end, with access to such powerful transformations and abilities, SpongeBob would be able to face the Chimera without any fear and emerge victorious. His powers and strength would be too much for the Chimera to handle, and SpongeBob would prove to be the ultimate warrior.

-Much more in terms of the Ancient Saiyans & Saiyan Gods, Omni Saiyan + All Forms/Evolutions/Fusions + Saiyan Physiology) vs. Sonic (Promo Comic)

This could be an interesting matchup, with SpongeBob's Saiyan and Ancient God powers going up against Sonic's incredible speed and agility. However, SpongeBob would still have the upper hand in this fight due to his immense strength and Supernatural abilities.

Even though Sonic's speed would allow him to dodge many of SpongeBob's attacks, SpongeBob's Supernatural strength and True God-Ki would enable him to land powerful blows when he does manage to connect. SpongeBob's access to God Abilities and Forms also would give him control over the elements, enabling him to catch Sonic off guard with unexpected attacks.

Furthermore, SpongeBob's Supernatural reproduction and energy levels would allow him to keep going indefinitely in the fight, while Sonic may tire from constantly running and dodging. SpongeBob's faster metabolism and ability to gain muscle mass faster also give him an advantage in terms of endurance and physical strength.

Overall, while Sonic's speed and agility would make him a tough opponent, SpongeBob's power, strength, and godly abilities make him nearly unbeatable in combat. Even Sonic's incredible speed could not help him escape SpongeBob's godly powers and unstoppable determination in battle.

-Much more in terms of the Ancient Saiyans & Saiyan Gods, Omni Saiyan + All Forms/Evolutions/Fusions + Saiyan Physiology) vs. Sonic (SATAM)

SpongeBob in his Full Potential Mode with all his substantial powers and enhancements would undoubtedly be a formidable opponent for Sonic from the SATAM universe. In this mode, SpongeBob would have reached his peak state, with all his powers amplified to their highest levels.

With his Saiyan willpower, extreme confidence, and desire for strength and power, SpongeBob would be an unstoppable force in this fight. His Ancient God Saiyan DNA and Supernatural strength would allow him to match Sonic's physical abilities, while his access to True God-Ki and regular Ki, along with a range of godly abilities and powers, would give him an edge over Sonic.

Additionally, SpongeBob's Supernatural reproduction and energy levels would allow him to fight without rest, while his faster metabolism and increased muscle mass gain would give him an advantage in terms of endurance and physical strength.

Moreover, SpongeBob's Omni Saiyan powers would enable him to transform into different powerful forms such as Super Saiyan and Super Saiyan God, making him even more powerful than he already is. With his godly abilities, SpongeBob could even gain control over the very elements of nature, creating deadly natural disasters that Sonic would struggle to dodge.

Overall, Sonic may have his incredible speed and agility, but against SpongeBob's Full Potential Mode, it would not be enough. With his Saiyan and godly powers, Supernatural abilities, and access to various godly forms, SpongeBob would emerge victorious against Sonic from the SATAM universe.
What if Sonic (OVA) were to go up against SpongeBob

In a fight against Sonic from the OVA, SpongeBob would still have a good chance of winning, though it would be a tougher matchup than against some of the other Sonic versions.

Sonic from the OVA is known for his incredible speed and agility, traits that could give SpongeBob some difficulties. Nevertheless, SpongeBob's Full Potential Mode would still allow him to match Sonic's attacks and stay in the fight. With his incredible strength and godly abilities, he would be able to land a few good blows and level the playing field.

Furthermore, SpongeBob's Supernatural reproduction and energy levels would give him an edge in terms of stamina and endurance, making it difficult for Sonic to wear him down. And with access to various godly abilities and forms, such as Super Saiyan God, SpongeBob would have the necessary arsenal to counter Sonic's fast and unpredictable movements.

Ultimately, while Sonic from the OVA would present a unique challenge, he would still be no match for SpongeBob's immense power, especially in his Full Potential Mode. With his Saiyan and Ancient God powers, Supernatural abilities, and access to numerous godly forms, SpongeBob would ultimately triumph and emerge victorious.
What about Sonic (Boom)

Sonic Boom's version of Sonic is known for his quick-wittedness and resourcefulness, but unlike some other versions, he does not possess superhuman speeds. However, he still possesses excellent agility, combat skills, and The Enerbeam, a rope-like energy weapon.

In this matchup, SpongeBob's Full Potential Mode would definitely give him an advantage over Sonic from Sonic Boom. With his immense strength, godly abilities, and Supernatural powers, SpongeBob would be able to withstand Sonic Boom's attacks and launch powerful counterstrikes.

In terms of speed, Sonic Boom would not be able to outrun SpongeBob, who can match the velocity of many of the fastest characters in all of fiction. Even with The Enerbeam, Sonic Boom would have a hard time dealing with SpongeBob's infinitely durable and virtually indestructible physique, as well as his godly powers.

Moreover, SpongeBob's Supernatural reproduction and energy levels would allow him to fight for an extended period, while his faster metabolism and increased muscle mass gain would give him an advantage in terms of endurance and physical strength.

Overall, while Sonic Boom is still a formidable opponent, SpongeBob's Saiyan and Ancient God powers, Supernatural abilities, and access to various godly forms would make him an almost unbeatable force. Lastly, with Sonic Boom's limited power set, SpongeBob would eventually emerge victorious in their matchup.
